examples: The idea that equipping homes with electrical appliances and other "modern" household technologies would eliminate drudgery, save labor time, and increase leisure for women.
People want to get away from the drudgery of their everyday lives.
Washing machines take the drudgery out of laundry, the latest models being entirely automatic and able to wash and dry a large quantity of clothes in a few minutes.
For many, this is the same number over and over and it might seem like drudgery.
That is the first and fundamental purpose of robots, after all -- to shoulder drudgery.
